titleStmt.title: SII 31.191: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 191. (A.R. No. B 255 of 1936.) ANANTAPALLE, TADEPALLIGUDEM TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar set up at the entrance into the mukhamaṇḍapa of the Vēṇugōpalasvāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1383, Prajāpati, Kārttika śu. 12, Friday. The cyclic year is Vṛisha not Pnajāpati and the day of the record corresponding to October 17, 1461 A.D.

It registers the gift of land measuring one puṭṭi along with the palm and mango trees situated to the south of Ṟompicheṟuvu to the god Śrī Kēśavaraya Perumāḷu at Arūṁḍi palli by Achinēni, the son of Chilkūri Kāchinēḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vijayādbu(bhyu)daya śakavarṣaṁbulu 1383 Agunēṁṭi prajāpati
saṁvvatsara kārttika śu 12 śu nāṁṭi puṇyakālamaṁdu Ānūṁḍḍipalliśrī
kēśavarāyaperumāḷaku cilukūri kācinēniṁgāri putrulaina Acinēniṁgāru
sāṣṭāṁga daṁḍapraṇāmaṁbbu sēsi Iccina tharmmaśāsanaṁ nāmu thāravōsi sa
marpiṁcina kṣētramu ṟoṁpiceṟuvu dakṣiṇāna puṭṭeḍu Āpaḍumaṭa pu
ṭṭeṁḍu Ā cēlalōni tā ḷlūnū māmiḷlanū sahitamugānu samarpiṁ
stimi . I(Ī)tharmmayavvarugāni Apahariṁcina gaṁga kaṟuta gōvu jaṁpisa
dōṣāna bō[I]na vāru .
Digital edition of SII 31.191 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
